title: Roar
why_this_song: Roar by Katy Perry (2013) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 18 times; first heard in: "'Cause I am a champion, and you're gonna hear me roar"
Appears 17 times; first heard in: "You hear my voice, you hear that sound"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "'Cause I am a champion, and you're gonna hear me roar"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Get ready 'cause I've had enough"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "'Cause I am a champion, and you're gonna hear me roar"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Now I'm floating like a butterfly
Stinging like a bee, I earned my stripes
I went from zero, to my own hero
You hear my voice, you hear that sound
Like thunder, gonna shake the ground
You held me down, but I got up (hey)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "roar" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "roar" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hear" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hear" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: So I sat quietly, agreed politely
I see it all, I see it now

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Roar" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Roar"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Katy Perry one question about "Roar", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Katy Perry sobre "Roar", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Roar" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Roar" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
